subject: [PATCH v2 2/3] mm/madvise: skip device-private PMDs in cold and pageout walks

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Provided additional context about thp_migration_supported() and suggested dropping the check altogether, replacing the VM_BUG_ON with a VM_WARN_ON_ONCE().

2026-07-08.patch_summary: This patch series addresses a potential double-put bug in the madvise_cold_or_pageout_pte_range() function, which can occur when device-private PMDs are involved. The patch allows device-private PMDs to be skipped in cold and pageout walks, preventing the VM_BUG_ON assertion from triggering unnecessarily.
